title: Section 54
content: The 1*** members, Director-General, Secretary, officers and other employees of the Bureau shall be deemed, when acting or purporting to act in pursuance of any of the provisions of this Act, to be public servants within the meaning of section 21 of the Indian Penal Code (45 of 1860).
footnote: 1. Certain words omitted by Act of 28 of 2010, s. 12 (w.e.f. 24-8-2010).
